signals.headline: Drift Protocol Hack Costs $280 Million | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol Hack Costs $280 Million | YES | HIGH confidence**

On April 1, the Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol suffered a **$280 million hack** through sophisticated social engineering that compromised multisig wallet signatories.[5] The breach targeted user deposits and trading assets and is being investigated with law enforcement and cyber experts.
